string 1:
One of Japan's top shopping districts. Various
shops and restaurants can be found in its many
buildings.

Japan's electronics retailer hotspot and source
of various sub-cultures. It is a world-famous
tourist destination.

An office district filled with many skyscrapers.
Numerous business people work here, unlike
in Higashi-Shinjuku.

A shopping district not far from Shinjuku
Station. Despite retaining its traditional
atmosphere, it is quite the bustling area.

The most distant land in the Digital World of Iliad,
it is a harsh locale often said to resemble outer
space.

The central city in the Digital World of Iliad, ruled
over by Merukimon, the god of speed.

An aquatic region surrounded by a beautiful
ocean. It is home to many Digimon who live
near the water.

An area featuring vast forests centered around
the World Tree, where the myriad veins of the
Current converge.

The industrial area of the Digital World of Iliad.
Under the management of Vulcanusmon, it
supplies electricity to the land.

This area features a temple devoted to the
Divine Oracle Junomon, who manages the
gate linked to the human world.

The sacred land of the exiled Titans. A barren
and desolate place, due to the lack of veins to
supply it with the Current.
